fallback_contact.name: Wayne Sage
fallback_contact.title: Owner, Harwood Design Builders
fallback_contact.rationale: Three principals: Wayne Sage (owner), Jeff Halstead and Trevor Bjarnarson (co-owners managing day-to-day). Harwood is residential reno-focused (high-end Winnipeg renovations). Light commercial fit. If Ashrah pursues high-end residential paint, Harwood is a strong candidate; otherwise medium fit. Phone the office; ask for Jeff or Trevor (operational decision-makers).

needs_review_flags: Harwood is residential reno-focused — different fit than commercial GC pursuit
Co-owners Jeff Halstead and Trevor Bjarnarson run operations; they're better day-to-day contacts than Wayne
personalization_hooks: Three-owner partnership model — pitch a multi-decision-maker firm with the 'protect your reputation' angle (renovations live or die on finish quality)
High-end Winnipeg residential reno — post-job professional cleaning and zero-callback paint quality are differentiators
